issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases.

scenarios.name: Headless Ghost blog post page in Next.js App Router
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses @tryghost/content-api with version v5.0, ghost.posts.read with include tags/authors and formats html, generateStaticParams + generateMetadata pulling meta_title/og_image, and export const revalidate = 60 per SKILL.md; baseline writes a fetch-based call without the typed Content API client or ISR pattern.

scenarios.name: Self-host Ghost via Docker with MySQL
scenarios.rationale: Treatment runs ghost:5 Docker image with url, database__client=mysql, database__connection__host, and ghost-content volume mounted at /var/lib/ghost/content as documented; baseline often picks SQLite defaults or omits the env-var connection config.
